nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: Python integration test using psycopg3 to verify type round-trips and data serialization in Postgres extended query protocol mode against RisingWave.

nodes.name: TestPsycopgExtendedMode
nodes.summary: unittest.TestCase subclass that tests extended query protocol type compatibility between psycopg3 and RisingWave for all scalar data types.
